arts.ttl: RC Lens register ‘concrete interest’ for Feyenoord’s Jeyland Mitchell
arts.sum: According to transfer specialist Fabrizio Romano, RC Lens want to move for Feyenoord's Jeyland Mitchell (20).

arts.ttl: Quilindschy Hartman makes comeback after more than nine months of absence
arts.sum: Quilindschy Hartman turned out for Feyenoord's U21s, receiving his first minutes in nine months after his cruciate ligament injury.

arts.ttl: Lens interested in Feyenoord’s Jeyland Mitchell
arts.sum: According to a report from Fabrizio Romano, RC Lens have “concrete interest” in a move for Feyenoord centre-back Jeyland Mitchell (20). The Costa Rican international only arrived in Europe from…

arts.ttl: Preview: Rijnsburgse Boys vs. Feyenoord - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's KNVB Beker clash between Rijnsburgse Boys and Feyenoord, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
